description:
Collect inventory data and metrics of your hosts and sends it to the New Relic platform.


What's Changed
- fix: Bump the embedded New Relic fluent-bit output plugin from 3.6.0 → 3.7.0.( windows) in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2283
- add unit tests for custom health check port in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2286
Full Changelog: https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/compare/1.78.0...1.78.1
